name: presentation-pro-designer
author: Tariq Said
description: Professional presentation design skill for creating, editing, and quality-checking presentations across education, corporate, proposal, product/service, verification, investor, data-report, and PPTX editing contexts.

key_features.type_specific_workflows: Different structures for each presentation type
key_features.source_priority: User uploads are highest priority design authority
key_features.no_fabrication: Never invents financial metrics or market data
key_features.smart_questioning: Max 5 clarifying questions, only when needed
key_features.brand_enforcement: Extract and apply brand rules from templates
key_features.comprehensive_qa: Content, design, source, accessibility, and technical checks

notes: Claude-focused package generated from the Presentation Pro Designer skill.
Use dist/claude/presentation-pro-designer.skill for Claude environments that support custom Skill upload.
Do not use external sources or financial APIs unless explicitly approved by the user.
